overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic city at dusk. The video begins in first-person perspective descending from a crosswalk to a waterfront promenade, then transitions to third-person follow mode while walking past street vendors. The scene features towering glass buildings with holographic advertisements, neon-lit skyscrapers, and a mix of natural twilight and artificial lighting.

events.description: descending from elevated crosswalk down to waterfront level

agents.ego_description: walking down the ramp from the crosswalk toward the waterfront canal

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
calm waterway running parallel to the walkway with concrete embankment
tall modern building with illuminated grid-pattern windows
futuristic circular skyscraper wrapped with glowing red and white holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a crosswalk with bold yellow stripes, then descends toward a waterfront promenade. The canal stretches into the distance on the left, while futuristic skyscrapers rise on both sides. The neon-lit cylindrical tower dominates the right skyline against the dusk sky.

events.description: passing concrete benches and seating areas along the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path, passing benches and railings

entered.detail: rectangular concrete seating blocks along the waterfront railing
low concrete barrier separating walkway from the canal
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade with the canal immediately to the left, bordered by concrete benches and railings. The cylindrical neon tower grows larger on the right, while a massive digital billboard comes into view. The path is wet, reflecting the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with parked vehicles and neon signage

events.description: moving from waterfront promenade to street level with vehicle traffic
red sports car and other vehicles driving past on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street past parked cars and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including a distinctive light blue vintage car
sculptural trees with dense canopies planted along the walkway
elevated pedestrian walkway or monorail track spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the waterfront to a bustling city street lined with parked cars and neon signs. Vehicles drive past on the right while the camera moves toward an overhead bridge structure. The cylindrical tower looms closer, wrapped in glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk with street vendors and pedestrians

events.description: camera perspective switches from first-person to third-person follow mode
passing street food vendor stalls with illuminated displays

agents.ego_description: following a group of pedestrians with distinctive blue hair and cybernetic modifications past food stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright blue hair and white jacket walking ahead of the camera
pedestrian with blue hair and dark vest walking alongside

entered.detail: colorful street food kiosks with illuminated menus and yellow structural elements

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person follow, tracking behind pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements and blue hair. The group walks past illuminated food vendor stalls on the left while the neon cylindrical tower dominates the center skyline ahead. The street remains busy with moderate pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet waterfront promenade into a bustling, neon-lit city street. It begins at a yellow-striped crosswalk, descending toward a canal where futuristic skyscrapers and a dominant cylindrical neon tower rise against the dusk sky. As the camera moves along the wet promenade, the reflections of city lights shimmer on the ground while a massive digital billboard emerges beside the towering structure. The scene then shifts from the waterfront to a crowded thoroughfare lined with parked cars and glowing signs, moving steadily toward an overhead bridge. Finally, the perspective transitions to a third-person follow mode, tracking behind cybernetically enhanced pedestrians as they pass illuminated food stalls with the glowing cylindrical tower looming centrally in the skyline.
